reasoning: Your limiter is the 9.3% drop from 5 to 20 minutes due to poor lactate clearance and underdeveloped aerobic base. The last ride showed a comfortable base at 60% FTP, so today we focus on integrating higher intensity at 88-108% FTP. This workout will prepare you for the Alpine Loop's key climb by simulating the demands of Emigration Canyon.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3 sets of 15 minutes: Alternate 2 minutes at 242-256W with 3 minutes at 201-218W

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
